name: Crear y Registrar Reunion - DRY RUN

parameters.query: INSERT INTO public.project_meetings (proyecto_id, client_id, title, meeting_date, meeting_time, meeting_type, description, participants, status, leader_id, meet_url, google_calendar_event_id, reminder_status) VALUES ('{{ $json.proyecto_id }}', '{{ $json.client_id }}', '{{ $json.title }}', '{{ $json.meeting_date }}', '{{ $json.meeting_time }}', '{{ $json.meeting_type }}', '{{ $json.description }}', '{{ JSON.stringify($json.participants) }}'::jsonb, 'scheduled', '{{ $json.robert_id }}', NULLIF('{{ $json.meet_url }}', 'null'), NULLIF('{{ $json.google_calendar_event_id }}', 'null'), 'pending') RETURNING id;
